serviceAccountJson.title: Service Account JSON
serviceAccountJson.description: Full service account key JSON (contents of the downloaded JSON file from Google Cloud).

subject.title: Subject / impersonated user (optional)
subject.description: Optional user email to impersonate when using Google Workspace domain-wide delegation.

scopes.title: OAuth scopes (optional)
scopes.description: Optional override for OAuth scopes. Defaults to drive + documents + spreadsheets + presentations.

token.title: OAuth Access Token
token.description: Short-lived Google OAuth access token with drive.file, documents, spreadsheets, and presentations scopes.
